overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an ancient Greek-themed video game showing a hooded character with weapons exploring a sunlit interior courtyard with stone columns and an open roof. The character examines the architecture, looks up at the skylight, and approaches a doorway leading to an outdoor garden area.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior atrium with central water basin

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the courtyard examining the stone architecture and central fountain

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the column facing the player character

entered.detail: rectangular stone water basin with decorative edges in the center of the courtyard
large dark wooden door with metal studs at the back of the atrium
tall fluted stone column with ornate capital on the left side
tall fluted stone column with ornate capital on the right side
intricate carved stone patterns along the upper wall above the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character explores a sunlit interior courtyard with classical Greek architecture. A central stone basin sits before a decorated wooden door, flanked by ornate stone columns. A robed NPC stands near the left column observing the player.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the open roof and blue sky above the atrium

agents.ego_description: character looks up toward the open skylight in the roof structure

entered.detail: rectangular opening in the roof revealing bright blue sky above
clear blue sky visible through the open roof aperture
detailed stone cornice and roof beams framing the skylight opening

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the open roof skylight, revealing bright blue sky and detailed upper stonework. The central basin and back door are no longer in view as the character examines the architectural ceiling details.

events.description: character approaches the doorway leading to the sunlit outdoor garden area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit doorway with greenery visible outside

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the exit doorway watching the player approach

entered.detail: stone archway leading to the exterior with bright sunlight streaming in
green trees and bushes visible through the open doorway
dark fabric curtains with decorative trim hanging beside the doorway
sunlit stone pathway visible beyond the doorway threshold

segments.scene_description: The character moves toward a doorway on the left side of the atrium, transitioning from the interior to an outdoor garden area. Green vegetation and bright sunlight become visible through the archway as the character approaches the exit, passing by the robed NPC standing near the threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit classical courtyard that transitions from an architectural study of the interior to an exit into a bright outdoor garden. It begins with the character exploring the atrium, passing a central stone basin and ornate columns where a robed NPC stands watch. As the character pauses, the camera tilts upward to leave the ground level behind, focusing on the detailed stonework of the ceiling and the brilliant blue sky visible through the open roof skylight. The perspective then shifts back down and glides toward a doorway on the left, moving past the robed figure as the interior shadows give way to the lush green vegetation and intense sunlight of the garden beyond.
